ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., Notebook/Tablet) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., A for notebooks and tablets) */,
  "energy_per_time" REAL /* Energy consumption per time unit (e.g., kWh/year) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of energy consumption (e.g., kWh/year) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., www.energystar.gov) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was submitted for certification */,
  "certification_status" TEXT /* Current certification status of the product */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes related to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_units FOREIGN KEY ("units") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., A for notebooks and tablets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., kWh/year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., www.energystar.gov) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manufacturer, auditor, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being certified */,
  "certification_type" TEXT /* Type of certification (e.g., energy efficiency, safety) */,
  "certification_number" TEXT /* Unique certification number */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was certified */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the certification (e.g., certified, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_access_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
